question_text:
127 Word Ladder

Word Ladder

A transformation sequence from word beginWord to word endWord using a dictionary wordList is a sequence of words beginWord -> s1 -> s2 -> ... -> sk such that every adjacent pair of words differs by a single letter. Return the number of words in the shortest transformation sequence.
input_format: Space-separated values as per problem arguments.
output_format: A single line representing the result.
explanation: Treat the problem as a shortest path search in an unweighted graph where words are nodes. Efficiently find neighbors by changing each character (a-z) at each position. Use BFS to find the shortest distance from beginWord to endWord.

test_cases.input:
hit
cog
hot dot dog lot log cog

hit
cog
hot dot dog lot log

lead
gold
load goad gold lead
